creator: sascha@root-login.org
text:
Created attachment 159359
patch file

Every version of this since 1.10.1 renders the duplicity ssh backend useless.
The ssh session hangs forever and eventually times out without transmitting anything.

The bug is quite old now:

https://github.com/paramiko/paramiko/issues/331

The attached patch "fixes" this. Actually I do not think it is a proper patch but upstream seems to ignore the problem so meanwhile it would be better to have a working software. The workaround is from this comment:

https://github.com/paramiko/paramiko/issues/331#issuecomment-64129801
